effect: Phoveus enhances the next Basic ATK, dealing (+250%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG and reducing the target's Hybrid ATK by 10% for 10s. He also gains a Shield equal to 8% of Max HP for 4s.

Esmeralda coheres the power of Astrospace, gaining Shield equal to 8% of Max HP for 4s. She deals (+400%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit) to nearby enemies and stuns them for 0.5s. Passive: Basic ATK deals (+50%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG and (+50%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG.
Khufra gains 300 Shield for 4s and sweeps targets within range in front, dealing (+510%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit) and stunning them for 1s.
Miya gains 35% ATK Speed for 5s. During this time, she shoots 1 extra Split Arrow(s) to deal 50% DMG and trigger ATK Effects.
Fanny whirls her blades, dealing (+550%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to nearby enemies (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit) and reducing their healing received by 30%.

Claude dashes to the current target and shoots for 3s, then returns to his original position. Each shot deals (+90%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies and triggers ATK Effects. He gains Control Immunity during skill cast. Passive: When deployed, Claude summons Dexter. Dexter inherits Claude's basic attributes and casts skill when Claude
notes: Passive text is cut off at the bottom of the panel; it ends mid-sentence at "...casts skill when Claude".

effect: Alucard deals (+500%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to the target.
Dyrroth enhances his next Basic ATK, dealing (+270%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to the target. Passive: When battle starts, Dyrroth and allies to his left and right gain 5% Hybrid Lifesteal.

Franco launches an iron hook towards the furthest enemy, dealing (+55%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG. He then drags the enemy back and gains a Shield equal to 10% of his Max HP. Afterward, he deals (+230%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to surrounding enemies (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit).
notes: Second row Physical Bonus: 230% / 230% / 350%; Percentage Shield: 10% / 10% / 12%.
